description: ConfigResourceCondition describes the status of configuration resources linked to Prometheus, PrometheusAgent, Alertmanager or ThanosRuler.

lastTransitionTime.description: lastTransitionTime defines the time of the last update to the current status property.

message.description: message defines the human-readable message indicating details for the condition's last transition.

observedGeneration.description: observedGeneration defines the .metadata.generation that the condition was set based upon. For instance, if `.metadata.generation` is currently 12, but the `.status.conditions[].observedGeneration` is 9, the condition is out of date with respect to the current state of the object.

reason.description: reason for the condition's last transition.

type.description: type of the condition being reported. Currently, only "Accepted" is supported.
